title: Monday.com Significant Lagging
excerpt:
I am having significant issues with lagging. I want to know if this is “normal” because it is very frustrating from my end.

posts.author: dwestby (Doug)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am having significant issues with lagging. I want to know if this is “normal” because it is very frustrating from my end.

Also, I have tried to reach out to sales rep for a few weeks now, unsuccessful. How does it work?

Am I the only one?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I haven’t had that issue. Have you reached out to support instead of sales?
